//: First rewrite is an intentional no-op passthrough for /assets/*. Vercel processes rewrites in order and stops at the first match. When the browser requests a stale /assets/Foo-HASH.js that no longer exists after a deploy, the first rule matches and keeps the path as /assets/Foo-HASH.js — Vercel then returns a clean 404 instead of falling through to the SPA catch-all (which would return index.html with text/html and cause a JS MIME-mismatch error).
